summary: Social media and communication app 'yasa' with real-time chat, voice/video calls, Instagram/Snapchat-style features, AI-powered content creation, moderation, and cross-platform integration
architectural_notes: Social media hub combining chat, voice/video, and Instagram/Snapchat-style features
AI-powered content creation, moderation, and personalization throughout
Consider APIs: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text for voice, AR SDKs for filters/effects
Content moderation via AI to detect inappropriate content
Cross-platform compatibility for integration with Instagram, Snapchat, etc.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern gradient app logo with 'Yasa' text in vibrant coral-to-purple gradient colors (logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Abstract wave pattern background in soft coral and purple tones for hero section (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Simple user avatar placeholder icon in neutral gray (avatar-placeholder.dim_128x128.png)
- Camera icon for post creation button in white with subtle shadow (camera-icon.dim_64x64.png)
- Heart icon for like button in coral color (heart-icon.dim_48x48.png)
- Chat bubble icon for messaging in purple (chat-icon.dim_48x48.png)

existing_features.title: Create user authentication system using Internet Identity for secure login and user session management
Implement user profile system with username, profile photo, and bio information that can be created and edited
Build a text-based messaging system where authenticated users can send and receive messages in real-time with other users
Create a photo and video post sharing system where users can upload images and videos with captions to share with other users
Implement a Stories feature where users can post ephemeral content (photos/videos) that automatically disappears after 24 hours
Create a content feed that displays posts from all users in reverse chronological order with infinite scroll
Implement like and comment functionality on posts where users can like posts and add text comments
Implement a follow/unfollow system where users can follow other users and view a following/followers list
Create a user search feature that allows searching for other users by username
Implement a notification system that alerts users about likes, comments, new followers, and messages
Create a reporting system where users can report inappropriate posts or users with reason categories

Design and implement a modern, mobile-first UI with a vibrant gradient color scheme (coral to purple), rounded card components, smooth animations, and a clean Instagram-inspired layout with bottom navigation
Render generated images for app branding and UI elements from frontend/public/assets/generated as static assets throughout the application

new_feature_requests.summary: Real-time chat with text, voice memos, and stickers
Voice and video calling with group chat capabilities
AI-powered chatbots for quick responses and engagement
Photo and video sharing with filters, effects, and AR capabilities
Stories and ephemeral content (24-hour disappearing content)
User-generated content feeds with AI-driven content discovery
AI tools for photo/video editing, music suggestions, and caption generation
Privacy controls, audience visibility, and post visibility settings
AI-powered content moderation and safety features
Reporting and feedback system with AI improvements
AI suggestions for content, groups, and friends based on user activity
Smart notifications and reminders adapting to user behavior
Cross-platform integration with other social media platforms
Create privacy controls allowing users to set their profile and posts to public or private visibility
